_meta.description: This file contains a serialized version of schema entities for drift.

data.name: string_entry
constraints: FOREIGN KEY(question)REFERENCES string(_id)ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE NO ACTION
FOREIGN KEY(answer)REFERENCES string(_id)ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE NO ACTION
FOREIGN KEY(field)REFERENCES field(_id)ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE
UNIQUE(question, answer, field)

data.name: not_string_entry
constraints: FOREIGN KEY(question)REFERENCES not_string(_id)ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE NO ACTION
FOREIGN KEY(answer)REFERENCES string(_id)ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE NO ACTION
FOREIGN KEY(field)REFERENCES field(_id)ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE
UNIQUE(question, answer, field)

data.name: test_wrong_answer_string
constraints: FOREIGN KEY(entry)REFERENCES string_entry(_id)ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE

data.name: test_wrong_answer_not_string
constraints: FOREIGN KEY(entry)REFERENCES not_string_entry(_id)ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE

data.name: test_paused
constraints: UNIQUE(test_type, field)
FOREIGN KEY(field)REFERENCES field(_id)ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE

data.name: study_till_correct_repeated_entry
constraints: FOREIGN KEY(field)REFERENCES field(_id)ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE
UNIQUE(field, study_till_correct_type, repeated_entry)

data.name: study_till_correct_paused
constraints: FOREIGN KEY(field)REFERENCES field(_id)ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE
UNIQUE(field, study_till_correct_type)

data.name: alternative_answer_string
constraints: FOREIGN KEY(entry)REFERENCES string_entry(_id)ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE
FOREIGN KEY(alternative_answer)REFERENCES string(_id)ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE NO ACTION
UNIQUE(entry, alternative_answer)

data.name: alternative_answer_not_string
constraints: FOREIGN KEY(entry)REFERENCES not_string_entry(_id)ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE
FOREIGN KEY(alternative_answer)REFERENCES string(_id)ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE NO ACTION
UNIQUE(entry, alternative_answer)

data.name: excluded_time
constraints: FOREIGN KEY(field)REFERENCES field(_id)ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE

data.name: scheduled_time_backup
constraints: FOREIGN KEY(field)REFERENCES field(_id)ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE

data.name: field_note
constraints: FOREIGN KEY(field)REFERENCES field(_id)ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE
UNIQUE(field, note)
